snippet.title: PATI PATNI AUR WOH DO (Trailer): Ayushmann, Wamiqa, Sara, Rakul | Mudassar, Bhushan K, Juno | 15 May
snippet.description:
15th May se Prajapati Pandey macha rahe hain bawaal… Kaun Patni, Kaun Woh? Hal karenge saare sawaal… Parivaar sahit dekhein! 

Presenting the Official Trailer of "Pati Patni Aur Woh Do" starring Ayushmann Khurrana, Sara Ali Khan, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rakul Preet Singh, Vijay Raaz, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Vishal Vasistha, Guneet Singh, Durgesh Kumar, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Shireesh Kumar Sharma and Deepika Amin 

#PatiPatniAurWohDo in cinemas worldwide 15th May 2026!

Gulshan Kumar, B.R. Chopra & T-Series Present

​A T-Series Films & B.R. Studios Production

"Pati Patni Aur Woh Do"

snippet.description:
#richadixit #prashantsingh #rakeshbabu #ayazkhan #shaileshmishra #gareebbetikeameersasural #trailer #trending #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH RAMA PRASAD PRODUCTION

फ़िल्म – गरीब बेटी के अमीर ससुराल (भोजपुरी फिल्म )

 D.I  - विजय सिंह (मुन्ना )
साउंड मिक्सिंग  – कृष्णा  विश्वकर्मा

snippet.title: HACKER OR WHAT! | JONATHAN IS BACK!!🖤 | BGMI ON ONEPLUS NORD 6
snippet.description:
https://www.amazon.in/b/?_encoding=UTF8&node=216828985031&is
Click to stay notified!
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆

"Chhaki Suna" - IN CINEMAS THIS RAJA - 12th JUNE 2026 

Every murder leaves a clue. Every game has a winner. But in this story, winning might cost you everything. Witness the beginning of the most twisted investigation of the year. snippet.title: Sing Geetham Official Teaser | Singeetham Srinivasa Rao | Nag Ashwin | Devi Sri Prasad | June 11
snippet.description:
Presenting the official teaser of #SingGeetham. In cinemas JUNE 11th, 2026.

𝐋𝐞𝐭’𝐬 𝐒𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐆𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐦… 🎶

#SSR61 is titled 'Sing Geetham'.

A story that has been waiting to unfold for 40 years…
A cinematic experience like never before is finally here! 🔥

Worldwide Theatrical Release On June 11th...

Cast: Ahilya Bamroo, Ayaan, Shalini Kondepudi, Siva Narayana, Banerjee and others....

snippet.title: EPIC - Teaser | Anand Deverakonda, Vaishnavi Chaitanya | Hesham AW | Naga Vamsi S | Aditya Hasan
snippet.description:
A beautifully crafted love story that captures the essence of everyday life and relationships ❤️

Here's EPIC Teaser. In Cinemas Very Soon.

CAST & CREW
Starring: Anand Deverakonda, Vaishnavi Chaitanya
Writer & Director: Aditya Haasan
Produced by: Suryadevara Naga Vamsi & Sai Soujanya
Music: Hesham Abdul Wahab
Cinematographer : Azeem Mohammad
Editing: Navin Nooli
Production designer: Avinash kolla 
Choreographer: Leelavathi
Costume designers: Sandhya Sabbavarapu

Camera operator: Ashok Seepally

snippet.title: I,Nobody Official Teaser | Prithviraj Sukumaran | Parvathy Thiruvothu | Nisam Basheer | Jakes Bejoy
snippet.description:
Presenting the Offcial Teaser of I,Nobody.

Cast :-

Prithviraj Sukumaran, Parvathy Thiruvothu, Hakkim Shahjahan, Ashokan, VijayaRaghavan, Madhupal,Shankar Ramakrishnan,Nakshathra, Aira , Nishanth Sagar, Nandhu, Noushad Bombay, Jijoy Rajagopal, Khalid Rahman, Sanju Sivaram,Sudhi Koppa, Beena Chandran, Sana Althaf, Krishnan Balakrishnan, Dineesh Alappuzha, Ronnie Varghese, Manoj KU, Irshad Ali, Sudhi Kozhikode, Mahendran, Albin Alex, Jithin Madanan,

Crew :-

Director : Nisam Basheer
Producers : Supriya Menon, Mukesh R Mehta, Cv Sarathi
Production Houses : Prithviraj Productions & E4 Experiments
Writer : Sameer Abdul
Director Of Photography : Dinesh Purushothaman
Editor : Ramees Mb
Music : Jakes Bejoy
Executive Producer : Harris Desom
Art : Arshad Nakkoth
Costume : Dhanya Balakrishnan
Makeup : Ronex Xavier
Action : Yannick Ben, Kalai Kingson & Amith Jolly Bastin
Sound Design : Nixon George
Sync Sound Recordist : Vivek Km
Chief Associate Director's : Benilal B, Binu G Nair
Production Controller : Rinny Divakar
Finance Controller : Kiran Nettayam
Vfx : Dtm
Vfx Head : Lava Kusha
Di : Mangopost
Colourist : Suresh Ravi
Pro : As Dinesh
Stills : Rohith K Suresh
Title Design : Seerow Unni
Design And Animation : Sarath Vinu
Publicity Designs : Yellowtooths
Teaser Edit : Bles Thomas
Marketing : Catalyst
Promotions: Poffactio
Design : Ting

Music Composed & Arranged by JAKES BEJOY

Music Producers : JAKES BEJOY, CHRISTY JOBY 

Guitars : SWARAJ V 
Veena : SACHIN BALU 
Vocals : MOSES TOBY

Session arranged & managed by MANEESH SHAJI & KHALID NAJ 

Music Mixed by BALU THANKACHAN
Assisted by SREENIVASA SHARMA 

Final Mix : MIDHUN ANAND at MINDSCORE MUSIC 
Assisted by UNMESH UNNIKRISHNAN 

Chief Associate : AKHIL J CHAND
Project Manager : AADI MANVIN
Team : VIPIN KUMAR

Recording Studio : MINDSCORE MUSIC, Cochin

Artist Co-ordination : K D VINCENT,
DON VINCENT

snippet.description:

दिल को छू जाने वाला ये खूबसूरत गाना “मिलो ना तुम तो हम घबराएं” एक गहरी मोहब्बत और तड़प की कहानी बयान करता है। जब प्यार सच्चा होता है, तो दूरियां भी बेचैन कर देती हैं — यही एहसास इस गाने के हर शब्द और हर सुर में झलकता है। ❤️

इस गाने में एक ऐसे दिल की बात कही गई है जो अपने प्यार के बिना अधूरा है। मिलन की चाह, जुदाई का डर और दिल की बेचैनी को बेहद भावुक अंदाज़ में पेश किया गया है।

✨ अगर आपने कभी सच्चा प्यार किया है, तो ये गाना आपके दिल को जरूर छू जाएगा।

🎧 Credits:
Singer: Sonu Raj
Music: Sonu Music
Lyrics Dev Raj

📌 अगर आपको ये गाना पसंद आए तो:
👍 Like करें
💬 Comment करें
🔔 Channel को Subscribe करना न भूलें

snippet.title: VARAVU - Trailer | Joju George | Arjun Ashokan | Shaji Kailas | Olga Productions
snippet.description:
Presenting the official Trailer of Varavu, featuring Joju George, Arjun Ashokan, Murali Gopy, Baiju Santhosh, Baburaj, Vani Vishwanath, and more. Produced by Naisy Reji under the banner of Olga Productions, directed by Shaji Kailas, with music composed by Sam CS.

Banner : Olga Productions
Produced by : Naisy Reji

Vani Vishwanath, Abhimanyu Shammi Thilakan

Editor : Shameer Muhammed
Stunts : Stunt Silva, Kalai Kingson, Phoenix Prabu, Rajashekar Master, Thavasi Raj, Mafia Sasi, Jackie Johnson
Executive Producer : Jomy Joseph, Rahul Reji Thomas
Head of Production : Ron Issac Thomas
Production Controller : Vinod Mangalath
Chief Associate : Syamanthak Pradeep
Audiography : Rajakrishnan MR
Sound Design: Rajakrishnan MR
Costume : Sameera Saneesh
Makeup: Saji Kattakada
Lyricist : Vinayak Sasikumar, Harinarayanan, Santhosh varma

snippet.title: Sattendru Maarudhu Vaanilai - Trailer | Jai | Yogi Babu | Babu Vijay | Meenakshi G | Girishh G
snippet.description:
Proudly Presenting the Official Trailer of  “Sattendru Maarudhu Vaanilai” Produced by BV Frames, in association with T Series, featuring Jai, Yogi Babu, Meenakshi Govindarajan, Garuda Ram and directed by Babu Vijay.  


In Cinemas Worldwide from 15th May 2026. 
---------------------------------
Connect with T-Series Tamil: 👉 http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTseriesTamil
---------------------------------
🎬 Movie Credits 🎬
Star Cast: Jai, Yogi Babu, Meenakshi Govindarajan, Garuda Ram, Sathyan, Sriman, Adthiya Kathir
Produced by: BV Frames
Directed by: Babu Vijay
Director Of Photography: Richard M Nathan
Music : Girishh Gopalakrishnan
Editing: Darling Richardson
Art Director: Kannan S
CFO: Sathyanarayanan R
Action: Murali G
Costume Designer: Kamali S
Sound Design & Mix: Tapas Nayak
Lyrics : ‘Mahakavi’ Bharathiyar Snehan, Girishh G and M.S. Krsna
Singer : ‘Thenisai Thendral’ Deva, Shreya Ghoshal, Jairam Balasubramaniam, Madurai Souljours, Girishh G and M.S. Krsna
Choreography: Sandy
Subtitle: Rekhs
Publicity Designer: Design Point
PRO: Sathish (AIM)
Vfx: Nxgen Media
DI: Infi nity Media
Stills: Jaikumar Vairavan
Costumer: Perumal Selvam
Makeup: Abdul Razack
Production Executives: Dindigul V Shivaraman
Direction Team - U Bhaskar,  Jose Fedrick PV, Rozar, Sharen S, Harini
Associate Editor- Karthik E L
Cinematography Team - Prabhu Dhayalan, Vijayan Chandran, Vikraman, H Andree Remo
 
Music Label: T-Series
------------------------------
Enjoy & stay connected with us!!

👉Subscribe to T-Series Tamil: http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTseriesTamil

Kaalo Chasmo (Official Video ) a New Latest Most Popular Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2026.Kaalo Chasmo Haryanvi Song Starring with Gulshan Music & Jaat Nia .This superhit Haryanvi Song Sung by Sandeep Surila & Ruchika Jangid. Kaalo Chasmo Song Lyrics : 

Ho Pilli Pilli Odhani Ko Lambo Lambo Ghunghat Look Yo Rajsthani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chale Banno Thari Saint Marke Chunni Me
Re Aagre Ko Gaghro Re Gach Thare Lagryo Choli Rajsthani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chal Banno Mhari Saint Marke Chunni Me

Re Mera Dhunga Matke
Re Mera Dhunga Matke
Ho Tere Ghaghre Me Kota Jaipur Latke
Re Tera Dhunga Matke
Re Tera Dhunga Matke
Ho Mere Ghaghre Me Kota Jaipur Latke
                                                (1)
Ho Gaddi Me Bi Dj Aale Gaana Tu Bajaiye Re
Re Gol Gol Gol Tu Kamar Matakaiye Re -2
Re Kamar Meri Ya Pkka Khajagi Maroda Je Me Nachi Mood Tufaani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chale Banno Thari Saint Marke Chunni Me 
                                               (2)
Re Is Chail Gaabru Chore Gelya Hoya Thara Rista Ji
Thare Gaane Sunke Ji Mera Nachan Ne Kar Farista Ji-2
Laage Nach Nach Todegi Floor Meri Jaan Re Tu Aari Mood Tufani Me
Re Kaalo Kaalo Chasmo Lgaake Chal Banno Mhari Saint Marke Chunni Me

🏆 India’s Pro BGMI Esports Showdown 🏆

The storm has arrived — and only the strongest will survive.

Welcome to the Grand Finals of Epigrotive Pro Scrims, powered by Epigrotive Gaming, where India’s top professional BGMI teams battle it out for dominance, glory, and a Championship.

This is not a casual lobby.
This is high-stakes BGMI esports at its absolute peak.

🗓️ GRAND FINALS

• Dates: 2nd - 4th MAY 2026
• Match Time: 1:00 PM IST onwards
• Game: Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI)

snippet.title: Ee Manase Full Video Song | Ustaad Bhagat Singh | Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela | Harish Shankar
snippet.description:
Fall in love with the soulful melody “Ee Manase Se Se” from Ustaad Bhagat Singh, starring Power Star Pawan Kalyan and the sensational Sreeleela.

This romantic masterpiece captures the essence of love, emotions, and connection through mesmerizing visuals and heartfelt music 💖

The evergreen voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam adds soul to this track, while music director Deva delivers a timeless melody. The poetic brilliance of Sirivennala Seetharama Sastry makes every line unforgettable.

Directed by Harish Shankar, this song blends modern visuals with classic romantic vibes, making it a must-watch for every Telugu music lover.

#EeManaseSeSe #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #Sreeleela #SPB #SPBalasubrahmanyam #DevaMusic #Sirivennala #HarishShankar #TeluguSongs #TeluguLoveSongs #RomanticSongs #Tollywood #LahariMusic #MelodySongs #TeluguMelody #LoveSongTelugu #TrendingTeluguSongs #4KTeluguSongs #NewTeluguSongs #toliprema

snippet.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizilbash

Executive Producers:
Oliver Berben
Victor Hadida
Richard Wright
Robert Bernacci

Cast:
Austin Abrams
Zach Cherry
Kali Reis
and Paul Walter Hauser

Credits not final

This film is not yet rated by The Motion Picture Association. For future rating information, please visit www.filmratings.com.  

#ResidentEvil #ResidentEvilMovie #ZachCregger #SonyPictures #OfficialTrailer #AustinAbrams #ZachCherry #KaliReis #PaulWalterHauser

Lyrics 
मुखड़ा 
मैसेज प मैसेज करियौ करो ही ना सीन गे 
बहुते प्यार करियौ कइसे करमी यकीन गे...2 

कबले हम रखियौ बोल सबर गे 
दिलवा के दे दियौ खबर गे 
की कवन मंदिरिया जा के धागा हम बान्हियौ 
जेकरा से हो जैमहि हमर गे....2 

अंतरा-1 
दिन रात तोहरे खोवाब में डूबल रहियौ 
 बैठिये के जान एक कोनवा में 

तोरे फोटऊवा हम Dp लगइले हियौ 
बेर बेर खोल के देखियौ फोन में 
नाशिक हियौ हम तोहर जबर गे 
मिलतौ नै हमरा जईसन लभर गे 

कवन मंदिरिया जा के धागा हम बान्हियौ 
जेकरा से हो जैमहि हमर गे.....
कवन देवी देवता के पूजा हम करियौ

snippet.title: Jai Shivrai | Raja Shivaji | Marathi | Riteish D | Ajay – Atul | In Cinemas 1 May
snippet.description:
जय शिवराय ही ललकारी घुमणार, छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांचा जयघोष होणार! 🚩

तुम्हां सर्वांच्या आग्रहास्तव महाराष्ट्र दिनानिमित्त सादर करीत आहोत 'जय शिवराय' व्हिडिओ साँग 🔥

आत्ताच आपलं तिकीट बुक करा! (U/A 16+) (मराठी आणि हिंदी)

‘हिंदवी स्वराज्याचे संस्थापक’ 🚩
छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांच्या प्रेरणादायी जीवनावर आधारित ‘राजा शिवाजी’ 

उद्यापासून आपल्या जवळच्या चित्रपटगृहात प्रदर्शित!

snippet.title: Sojugada Sooju Mallige | ಸೋಜುಗಾದ ಸೂಜುಮಲ್ಲಿಗೆ | Lord Shiva Kannada Bhakti Songs | Shiva Haadugalu
snippet.description:
Sojugada Sooju Mallige | ಸೋಜುಗಾದ ಸೂಜುಮಲ್ಲಿಗೆ | Lord Shiva Kannada Bhakti Songs | Shiva Haadugalu



Listen to the soulful and divine Sojugada Sooju Mallige | ಸೋಜುಗಾದ ಸೂಜುಮಲ್ಲಿಗೆ, one of the most popular Lord Shiva Kannada Devotional Songs (Shiva Haadugalu) that touches the heart of every devotee.

This powerful song glorifies Lord Shiva (Mahadeva / Shambho) and is widely loved for its deep spiritual meaning and devotional feel. Devotees believe that listening to Shiva songs brings peace, removes negativity, and fills life with divine blessings and positivity.

This collection of Kannada Shiva devotional songs is perfect for daily prayers, meditation, Monday special worship, and spiritual upliftment. Let the divine vibrations of Shiva Bhakti Geethegalu fill your life with peace, strength, and devotion.

🙏 Om Namah Shivaya
🙏 Hara Hara Mahadeva

 
#SojugadaSoojuMallige #ShivaSongsKannada #Mahadeva #KannadaBhakti

 
cccc

snippet.title: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
snippet.description:

#radhakrishna #radhabhajan #krishnabhajan #radharani

radha hit bhajan mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo vrindavan ko, peaceful radha krishna bhajan, mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo bhajan, farmani naaz mohe mor bhanaiyo radha, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, मोहे मोर बनाइय्यो राधा, radha krishna bhajan, radha krishna bhajan 2026, mohe mor banaiyo farmani naaz, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo, aagle janam radha morni banaiyo, mohe mor banaiyo, popul;er bhajan mohe mor, aagle janam radha sadhu banaiyo, aagle janam radha bander banaiyo, 

Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Bajao Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

localized.title: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
localized.description:
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

#radhakrishna #radhabhajan #krishnabhajan #radharani 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा
mohe brij ko baniyo mor
राधे मोहे ब्रज को बनाइयो मोर
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ko
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ka
mohe mor banaiyo radha kratika thakur
mohe mor banaiyo radha ringtone
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne
mohe mor banaiyo radha rani
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ko song
mohe mor banaiyo radha bhajan
mohe mor banaiyo radha radha
mohe mor banaiyo radha film
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vindavan ko bhumika sharma
radha hit bhajan mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo vrindavan ko, peaceful radha krishna bhajan, mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo bhajan, farmani naaz mohe mor bhanaiyo radha, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, मोहे मोर बनाइय्यो राधा, radha krishna bhajan, radha krishna bhajan 2026, mohe mor banaiyo farmani naaz, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo, aagle janam radha morni banaiyo, mohe mor banaiyo, popul;er bhajan mohe mor, aagle janam radha sadhu banaiyo, aagle janam radha bander banaiyo, 

Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Bajao Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

snippet.title: Kala Tikli Viral song 🔥/ New Nagpuri sadri dance video 2026 / Santosh Daswali / Anjali Tigga / Vinay
snippet.description:
स्वागत है 2026 के सबसे बड़े Nagpuri  धमाका video सॉन्ग "Kala Tikli " में! इस वीडियो में आपको मिलेंगे Santosh Daswali और Anjali Tigga, जो नागपुरी और हो भाषा में भी मशहूर हैं। यह गाना Mayang Mayang 2 Song के ट्रेंड से इंस्पायर्ड होकर बनाया गया है, जो इस साल का सुपरहिट फ्यूज़न है।

Song- Kala Tikli / New Nagpuri sadri dance video 2026 / (Moy lagaye lelo kariya chasma)

Santosh Daswali Official Presents

Feat- Santosh Daswali & Anjali Tigga & Priya Sandil

Dop- Shiva Angrai , Mukesh Mahato, Goutam Addy

Drone - Mukesh Mmr 

Mackup - Ravi Singh Sardar , Sunny lamay

Director Choreographer Editor - Santosh Daswali 



Special thanks to Joya Series, Aditya Birua, Jony Bhuiya







*Special 2026 Edition:* Inspired by Nagpuri and Ho culture, this song blends trending elements from Mayang Mayang Song to bring you a unique 2026 Nagpuri hit.

*लाइक, शेयर और सब्सक्राइब करें!*

*Contact - Santosh Daswali insta I'd - https://www.instagram.com/santoshdaswali?igsh=dTlqZDM3NHdsdDN3


email- santoshdaswali111@gmail.com

snippet.description:
Krishnavataram’s new track Krishna Govinda, 'A Sacred Dance of Devotion' comes alive in the voice of Sunidhi Chauhan.  

Releasing in theatres worldwide on May 7, 2026, in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu 

#KrishnaGovinda #Krishnavataram #7MayKrishna #sunidhichauhan #SaathMayKrishna #saregamamusic 

👉 Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Music Composer: Prasad S. 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil  
Vocals: Sunidhi Chauhan 
 
Directed by: Hardik Gajjar 
Produced by: Sajan Raj Kurup, Shobha Sant 
Produced by: Poonam Shroff, Parth Gajjar 

Starring:

snippet.title: Patti Show | Athiradi | Tovino Thomas | Basil Joseph | Vishnu Vijay | Dabzee | Arivu | Suhail Koya
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Malayalam

Presenting the second single "Patti Show" from 'Athiradi' starring Tovino Thomas, Basil Joseph, Zarin Shihab, Riya Shibu and others. Directed by Arun Anirudhan. Music Composed by Vishnu Vijay

Song Credits: 
Song: PATTI SHOW
Movie: Athiradi
Singer: Dabzee, Arivu, Suhail Koya
Lyrics: Suhail Koya, Arivu
Music Composed, Arranged and Produced by Vishnu Vijay @ DRAVIDA STUDIOS, CHENNAI

STUDIOS:
Arivu vocals Recorded @ DRAVIDA STUDIOS, CHENNAI
Dabzee vocals recorded @ 2bq studios, Chennai
Artist Liaison & Distribution Manager : Poornima Kannan
Additional Music Producer : DOPEMYN
Music Production Manager : Christy Thomas Cherian
Studio Sessions Manager : Paul Renold
Artist Session Manager : K D Vincent
Mixing & Mastering : Sujith Sreedhar@The Masterhouse,2bq studios,Chennai. 
Assisted by Amal Mithu
Sessions manager:Vignesh Raj
            

Movie Credits: 
Directed By: Arun Anirudhan
Produced By: Dr. Ananthu S  &  Basil Joseph
Co-producers: Sameer Thahir, Tovino Thomas
Written By: Paulson Skaria, Arun Anirudhan
DOP: Samuel Henry
Editor: Chaman Chakko
Music Composer : Vishnu Vijay
Lyrics: Suhail Koya
Production Designer: Maanav Suresh
Costume Designer: Mashar Hamsa
Make Up: Ronex Xavier
Stunts: Action Sandhosh & Phoenix Prabu
Sound Designer: Nixon George
Production Controller: Antony Thomas
Art Director: Akhil Damodhar
Executive Producers: Nikhil Ramanath & Amal Xavier Manackatharayil
Sound Mix: Rajakrishnan MR
DI Colorist: Joyner Thomas
Additional Dialogues: Sonu Surendran
Finance Controller: Midhun K Varghese
VFX: Mindstein Studios
Chief Associate Directors: Suku Damodar, Sohil
Stills: Rohith K Suresh
Title Design: Sarcasanam
PRO: Vaisakh C Vadakkeveedu & Jinu Anilkumar
Publicity Designs: Yellowtooths
Digital Content: Dripwave Collective

Lyrics: 
Maanam Vaappaante 
B - maanam Vaappaanthe 
per annum Vaappaante - 
Shatha - Kodi

Stardom Vaappaante
Paytm Vaappaante 
KTM Vaappaante
Beta - Dhaande  !!

tail mele kuthiyaadane (Dhaande)
rail pole trippyaadane x 2 

Patti show  
Jetti show
Idakkidakku petty show
Thalaykkuzhinjarinjerinja pacharikku pathu show
Mothamaayi Mathi Show
Mothamaale nirthi Show
Fake  pandam methaninju DP-ittu thotti show

(Patti Show
Patti Show
Patti Show
Patti Show )

Othaikku otha vaada
Naa gettikaaran da
Vethala paakku beeda
Naa madichi thaarean da
Ippudu ippudu choodu 
Naa ishta kaaran da
Chakkara chakkara cheeni 
Na patti scene da

Tharamana kallu kitta
Orasi paakkatha
Padhanaalu pallu poitta
Nurse ha kekkatha
Pangali bamma bamma 
Bamma nammaale
Singari Singam Singam 
Singam nammaale 

Thug uh ma  Thug uh ma 
Thug uh varan Thallu ma
Thug uh varan Thallu ma 
Sollu ma Sollu ma 

So so so so so so 
Solo king uh varan sollu ma

Kaane Maamane !
Thani ‘Show’guna Raavanan
Thiru-4K Show-nakan
Pothujana-Naduvilu
Prakadana Mikavithu Kaanane!!

(Maanam Vaappante)

College-ku gethu naanu da
Tail-mele kuthiyaadane

Knowledge-kku vithuvaan nu da
Rail pole trippyaadane

Ketta Show
Atta Show
Idaykkidaku Potta Show
Chavacharacha gum pole
Thottidathu Otti Show
What about Orotta show?
Next time, Not a show!
Michamundu ?
Kashtamundu
Nirthivekku
Petti Show !


Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

To buy the original and virus free track, visit www.saregama.com
Follow us on: YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/Saregamamalayalam
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/Saregamamalayalam
X: https://twitter.com/saregamasouth​​

#PattiShow #Athiradi #BasilJoseph #SaregamaMalayalam

snippet.title: Tera Chehra 8K/4K Music Video | Arijit Singh | Harshvardhan | Himesh Reshammiya | Sanam Teri Kasam
snippet.description:
Experience the timeless romance of Tera Chehra from the film Sanam Teri Kasam in stunning 8K/4K quality. Featuring Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane this soulful track is sung by Arijit Singh with composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

#terachehra #8k #arijitsingh #8kvideo  #sanamterikasam #harshvardhanrane #himeshreshammiya

Credits:
Song - Tera Chehra
Singer - Arijit Singh
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Shabbir Ahmedd

Lyrics:
Meri bechainiyon ko chain mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Mere deewanepan ko sabr mil jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na aankhon se
bheega bheega pyaar beh jaata hai

Meri tanhaiyon ko noor mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Main raat-din ye duaa karun
Tere liye main jiyun marun
Chaaron pehar tujhe dekha karun
Mera jahan ye tujhpe fanaa karun

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na honthon pe tera ehsaas
Reh jaata hai

Mere har raaste ko manzil mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Berang hawayein mujhe naa jaane
De gayi sadaa kyun abhi abhi
Hai sarfaroshi ye aashiqui bhi
Jaayegi jaan meri isme kabhi

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na har lamha teri daastaan
keh jaata hai

Meri har ik tadap ko sukoon mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

snippet.title: War Of Shera (Title Track) Parmish Verma x MC Square
snippet.description:
"War of Shera" is a high-energy title track featuring the powerful combo of Parmish Verma and MC Square. Packed with intense beats, fierce lyrics, and unstoppable attitude, the track perfectly matches Shera’s larger-than-life vibe and action-packed aura. 🔥🎬

Song Credits :
Singer - Parmish Verma feat. Mc square 
Lyrics - laddi chahal 
Music - nikhil swapnil 
Video - Mj singh

Jbco Films Present 'Shera'
Producer :- Anmol Sahni
Written & Directed by - Savio Sanddhu

Cast: Parmish Verma, Sonal Chauhan , Manav Vij, Hashneen Chauhan, Yograj Singh, Dakshajit Singh, Pardeep Cheema, Mahavir Bhullar, Rose J Kaur, Paramveer Singh, Victor John, Guru Bumrah 

Production House: JBCO Films
DOP: Anik R Verma
Editor: Haardik singh reen
Music & BGM : Gaurav Dev, Kartik Dev
Dialogue: Guru Sidhu
Associate Director: Jimmy Rampal
Art Director: Alok Haldar
Action Director: Mukesh Kamboj 
Sound Designer: Manoj M Goswami (Firefly)
DI Studio: NY Di Wala
DI Colorist: Santosh Pawar (Shanty)
Executive Production: Hindway
VFX: NAP Studio
Visual Promotion: Studio Hardik
2nd DOP : MJ singh 
Direction Team : Sonya Kashyap , Monika Heer , Shree sharma , Jaswinder singh , Karan mankoo , Meet kang  , Parladh sharma , Danish Bhullar  
World Wide Distribution: The next Films
Music Label: Speed records 
Broadcasting and Promotions: MDN Entertainment
Costume Designer: Rajinder Singh 
Costume Stylist : Rajinder singh & Annie Gulati
Publicity Design : Rajesh Ghadigaonkar

Track : Aukhi Ho Jao Kaid Katni
Artist : Mohd. Sadiq, Mohd. Siddique, Ranjit Kaur
Lyricist : Babu Singh Maan
Music Composer : K. Pannalal
Special Thanks : Saregama Music

Speed Records Team :
Manager – Chander Saini
Digital Head – Ishan Verma
Team Head – Mehak Maingi
Graphic Head – Varun Sappal
Business Acquisition Managed by – Angadpreet Singh

snippet.title: Chhati Ke Lagaye Rakhu | Propose Karange | Khatri & Divyanka | Haryanvi Song 2026 | Love Song 2026
snippet.description:
Chhati Ke Lagaye Rakhu | Propose Karange | Khatri & Divyanka | Haryanvi Song 2026  | Love Song 2026

DESI TUNE 🎵 PRESENTS LATEST NEW HARYANVI SONG 2025  🌍 🎵 “ PROPOSE KARANGE ” BRAND NEW HARYANVI 🎶 🗣️ SONG IN THE VOICE OF “ INDER SUFI ” AND STARING “ KHATRI  | DIVYANKA SIROHI ” MUSIC DIRECTED BY “ AKSHAT RAHI ”🎵 🎼 LYRICS PENNED BY “ INDER SUFI ” 🖊️ 🔖 THE VIDEO OF THE NEW HARYANVI SONG IS DIRECTED BY “ SACHIN KATHURIA  ” 🎬🎥


Make Your Reels :   / 3885675671681984  

Desi Tune -      / desitune_musiclabel  
Subscribe -​⁠ ​⁠​⁠‪   / @desi_tune    

🎬 Song Credits:-

Song :- Propose Karange
Starring :- Praveen Khatri | Divyanka Sirohi
Singer :- Inder Sufi
Lyrics/Composer:- Inder Sufi
Music :- Akshat Rahi
Mix/Master :- DR DAW
Video :- Sanjeet Saroha
Dop :- Harsh Sharma

#ChhatikeLagayerakhu
#ChhatiseLagayerakhu

#ProposeKarange #DivyankaSirohi #HaryanviSong #HaryanviLoveSong #NewHaryanviSong #RomanticSong #Haryanvi2025 #LoveSong2025 #LatestHaryanviSong #karwachauthspecial  #NewRomanticSong

chhati se lagaye rakhu,
chati ke lagaye rakhu,
Propose Karange,
Propose Karange song,
Propose Karange song 2025,
Propose Karange New song,
Propose Karange New song 2025,
Propose Karange Romantic Song 2025


Purpose Karenge :-

Spotify = https://open.spotify.com/track/734acz...
JIo Saavn  = https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/purpose...
Gaana = https://gaana.com/album/purpose-karange
Yt =    • Propose Karange  
Ig =   / 3885675671681984  


सात जन्मों का वादा ना ही करूं मैं गौरी,
जितने भी साँस प्यार करे जाऊँगा , 
दुःख सुख जिंदगी में आते रहवंगे ,
औखे सोखे मै हालात गेल लडे जाऊँगा ,
नु हौसला न छोड़ इस दिल ने तू जोड़ ,
आप मिलके ने दोनु घणी मौज करांगे ,
         
एक दूसरे ने रोज प्रपोज़ करांगे ,
मीठी प्यार की लड़ाई आपा रोज करांगे-2
                        1
छाती के लगाये राखूं नैना में बसाये राखूं ,
अपना बना के राखू छोड़ के ना जाऊंगा ,
सुन लो जनाब मेरे एक एक खवाब तेरे ,
बन गए इब मेरे सारे में पुगाउंगा ,
जितना कमावांगै खुशी खुशी खावांगे ,
ज्यादा आपां पीसा का ना लोभ करांगे,

एक दूसरे ने रोज प्रपोज़ करांगे ,
मीठी प्यार की लड़ाई आपा रोज करांगे-2
                      2
दिल में मकान होना सुथरा जहान होना ,
जीना भी आसान होना नू आपा जीवांगे ,
प्यार भरी शाम होना दिल का कलाम होना ,
नैना आला जाम होना सिप सिप पीवांगे ,
कदे तोडूंगा न आस राख मेरा विश्वास ,
दोनु मिलके ने प्यार आली जॉब करेंगे,

एक दूसरे ने रोज प्रपोज़ करांगे ,
मीठी प्यार की लड़ाई आपा रोज करांगे,

---------------------------------------------------

Saat janmaa ka vaada na hee karoon main gori, 
Jitne bhi  saans pyaar karee jaoonga , 
duhkh sukh Zindagi mein aate Rahvenge , 
okhe sokhe main haalaat gel laade jaoonga , 
nu hausala na chhod is dil ne too jod , 
aap milake ne donu ghanee mauj karaange , 

Ek doosare ne roj propose karange , 
Mithi pyar ki ladai aapa roj karange, 
                                   1
 Chhati ke lagaaye raakhoon naina mein basaaye raakhoon , 
apana bana ke raakhoo chhod ke na jaoonga , 
sun lo janaab mere ek ek Khwaab tere , 
ban ge ib mere saare mein pugaunga , 
jitana kaamavange re khushi khushi  khaavange , 
jyaada aapaan peesa ka na lobh karaange,

 Ek doosare ne roj propose karange , 
Mithi pyar ki ladai aapa roj karange, 
                                  2
 dil mein makaan hona suthara jahaan hona ,
 jeena bhee aasaan hona nooe aapa jeevaange , 
pyaar bharee syaam hona dil ka kalaam hona , 
naina aala jaam hona sip sip peevaange , 
kade todunga na aas raakh mera vishvaas , 
donu milake ne pyaar aali job karenge, 

Ek doosare ne roj propose karange , 
Mithi pyar ki ladai aapa roj karange, 

Thanks Everyone for Watching Our New Latest Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2025. If you like This Latest Haryanvi Song than SUBSCRIBE Our Channel With Press Bell Icon to get notification of our New Latest Most Popular Superhit Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2025. We Will Provide Best Haryanvi Songs Of All Time.

सात जन्मों का वादा ना ही करूं मैं गौरी,
जितने भी साँस प्यार करे जाऊँगा , 
दुःख सुख जिंदगी में आते रहवंगे ,
औखे सोखे मै हालात गेल लडे जाऊँगा ,
नु हौसला न छोड़ इस दिल ने तू जोड़ ,
आप मिलके ने दोनु घणी मौज करांगे ,
         
एक दूसरे ने रोज प्रपोज़ करांगे ,
मीठी प्यार की लड़ाई आपा रोज करांगे-2
                        1
छाती के लगाये राखूं नैना में बसाये राखूं ,
अपना बना के राखू छोड़ के ना जाऊंगा ,
सुन लो जनाब मेरे एक एक खवाब तेरे ,
बन गए इब मेरे सारे में पुगाउंगा ,
जितना कमावांगै खुशी खुशी खावांगे ,
ज्यादा आपां पीसा का ना लोभ करांगे,

एक दूसरे ने रोज प्रपोज़ करांगे ,
मीठी प्यार की लड़ाई आपा रोज करांगे-2
                      2
दिल में मकान होना सुथरा जहान होना ,
जीना भी आसान होना नू आपा जीवांगे ,
प्यार भरी शाम होना दिल का कलाम होना ,
नैना आला जाम होना सिप सिप पीवांगे ,
कदे तोडूंगा न आस राख मेरा विश्वास ,
दोनु मिलके ने प्यार आली जॉब करेंगे,

एक दूसरे ने रोज प्रपोज़ करांगे ,

okhe sokhe main haalaat gel laade jaoonga , 
nu hausala na chhod is dil ne too jod , 
aap milake ne donu ghanee mauj karaange ,

apana bana ke raakhoo chhod ke na jaoonga , 
sun lo janaab mere ek ek Khwaab tere , 
ban ge ib mere saare mein pugaunga , 
jitana kaamavange re khushi khushi  khaavange , 
jyaada aapaan peesa ka na lobh karaange,

 Ek doosare ne roj propose karange ,

 dil mein makaan hona suthara jahaan hona ,

snippet.title: Top 30 Hindi Filmi Songs | Purane Hindi Songs | मुझे इश्क है तुझी से | तेरी दोस्ती मेरा प्यार
snippet.description:
Top 30 Hindi Filmi Songs | Purane Hindi Songs | मुझे इश्क है तुझी से | तेरी दोस्ती मेरा प्यार

JUK0031

मुझे इश्क है तुझी से 
तुम्हीं ने दर्द दिया है 
इक परदेसी मेरा दिल ले गया 
लागी छूटे ना अब तो सनम 
जो बात तुझमे है 
वो जब याद आये 
तुमने किसी की जान को जाते हुए देखा है 
चाहूंगा मैं तुझे सांझ सवेरे 
हुस्न से चाँद भी शरमाया है 
तेरी प्यारी प्यारी सूरत को 
तेरी दोस्ती मेरा प्यार 
आज कल मे ढल गया 
सुहानी रात ढल चुकी 
कह दो कोई ना करे यहाँ प्यार 
गम ऐ हस्ती से बेगाना 
वो जब याद आए 
हम अपनी महफ़िल मे 
अकेला हूँ मैं 
साथी ना कोई मंज़िल 
मायूस तो हूँ वादे पे 
दिल इक मंदिर है 
मेरे प्यार में तुझे क्या मिला 
ये रात बहुत रंगीन सही 
गम की रात कटे 
किसी की याद में 
मन रे तू काहे ना धीर धरे 
हमने जफ़ा ना सीखी 
राही मनवा दुःख की चिंता 
मोहब्बत ज़िंदा रहती है 
ज़िंदगी क्या है गम का दरिया है

snippet.title: KANGULA - 4k Official Full Video l Sambeet Acharya, Anshuman l Aswin Tripathy @BABUBHAIPRODUCTION
snippet.description:
#kangulaodiafilm #babubhaiproduction #newodiasong


🎬 KANGULA – MAA KALI RA DANDA NACHA | OFFICIAL FULL VIDEO (4K)
🌺 In Cinemas Worldwide from 24th April 2026
When faith crosses limits…
When devotion transforms into शक्ति…
A divine force awakens beyond control.
Presenting the Official Full Video of KANGULA, a soul-stirring cinematic experience inspired by Odisha’s sacred Danda Nacha tradition — where pain becomes prayer, and devotion becomes शक्ति.
Rooted in the culture and soil of Odisha, powered by the fierce energy of Maa Kali, KANGULA brings a gripping tale of belief, sacrifice, mystery, and divine strength that echoes across generations.
This is not just a film…
This is a ritual.
This is the roar of faith.
🔱 The beats are louder.
🔥 The fire rises higher.
🌺 Maa Kali is here.
🎵 SONG CREDITS – "KANGULA"
Singer: Krishna Beuraa
Lyrics: Dr. Nirmal Nayak
Music: Baidyanath Dash
Music Arrangements: Abhishek Panigrahi
Recorded, Mixed & Mastered by Somesh Satpathy @ Somesh Studio
🎥 FILM CREDITS

Starring : Navpreet Arora
Producer: Suvendra Kumar Malla (Litu) & Sambeet Acharya
Director: Aswin Tripathy
Line Producer: Subodha Mohapatra (Bubu)
Story: Sambeet Acharya
Screenplay & Dialogue: Amit Kumar Dash & Anil Barik
Music: Baidyanath Dash, J N Padma & Sumit Dixit
Background Music: Nabs & Saroj
Cinematography: Ishwar Barik
Editor: Manas Kumar Sahoo
Associate Editor: Debadatta Biswal
Colorist: P.V Manikumar
DI Studio: Cherry Pix, Kolkata
Voice Dubbing: Shakti Studio
Sound Designer: Jubin Raj
Sound Design Studio: SoundSmith Studio, Kerala
Choreographer: Firoz & Dibya
Styling: Prerna Pratikshya
Art Director: Sudhanshu Mohanty (Nilu)
Costume Partner: OAURA
Costume Man: Prabitra Mehena
Associate Director: Durllava
Assistant Directors: Joy, Shanti, Satyajeet
Production Manager: Sankar
Make Up: Sourav Lenka (Pupun)
Edit Studio: Pupul Films
Publicity Partner: IDOL ODISHA
Publicity Design: Blank Canvas RGF
Camera Equipment: Digital Dreams
Creative Visual: ATF Studio
Stills: Basudev Films
BTS Making: Sourav Nath
Visual Effects: Subrat
Promo GFX: The M Factor
🔔 Like | Share | Comment
📌 Subscribe for more updates
#Kangula #OfficialFullVideo #4KVideo #MaaKaliRaDandaNacha #InCinemas24April2026 #OdiaCinema #DandaNacha #JaiMaaKali #OdiaCulture #KangulaFilm #IndianCinema #KrishnaBeuraa #NirmalNayak

snippet.title: Kanave | Mrz Thoppi | Gallery Vision Indie
snippet.description:
Presenting “Kanave” Official Lyrical Video, sung by MRZ Thoppi and Dharsana, with lyrics and composition by Jaqer. Produced by Sharaf Gallery and presented by Gallery Vision Indie.

Music Credits: 

Vocals : MRZ Thoppi, Dharsana
Lyrics & Composition : Jaqer
Additional Lyrics : Ali Najih
Produced by : Sharaf Gallery
A&R and Project Design : Suhas KS
Executive Producer : Kiran Benny
Project Coordination : Moidu Amar
Mix & Master : Zeusheelan 
Studio : Gallery Vision Audio Hub 
Label Manager : Jinu AJ
Lyrical Video : Binoyka
Ai Support : Aflalul Hashim 
Poster Design: Muhsin Raziey

Click here to get all streaming platforms links👇   
   
Youtube Music : https://bit.ly/3QNIouk
JioSaavn : https://bit.ly/4n1RuQ2
Deezer : https://bit.ly/3OVcYle
Youtube : https://bit.ly/4dl8eOY
Instagram Audio : https://bit.ly/4cQsxCs

Lyrics:

Kanave nee marayathe 
Mizhiyil maayathe...
Ninave piriyaathe
En hridhayam neerunne.....

Irulai en lokam 
Idarunnen nenjam 
Thirayunnee sneham 
Ariyum nin shwasam (2)

Innu maayum mazhaye 
Ennil theeyaayi niraye 
Thedum akale akale 
Theera kadalin thiraye
Ennil theerum ulakam
Manjil theeyaayi urukum
Thammil piriyan orungum 
Neram thaane thalarum 

..Ohhhhh... Ohhhh...
Ohhhhh...Ohhhhhh...Ohhhh.

aaa...aaaaa...aaa...    

Theeyaayi nenjil neerum kanalai udalil 
Ninnil aliyan njanum pathiyee....

Mazhayayi nanayan 
Ninn... Maaril punaran 
Ithalai viriyaan njanum azhake..........

Irulai en lokam 
Idarunnen nenjam  
Thirayunnee sneham 
Ariyum nin shwasam (2)

..Ohhhhh... Ohhhh...
Ohhhhh...Ohhhhhh...Ohhhh.

Ohhhhhhhhhh....

Mrz Thoppi👇
https://open.spotify.com/artist/78q0iNXpcPCsF9YOYQDoXw

snippet.title: मंगल भवन अमंगल हारी | Ramayan Chaupayi | सम्पूर्ण रामायण कथा | Ravi Raj | Ram Katha 2026
snippet.description:
मंगल भवन अमंगल हारी | Ramayan Chaupayi | सम्पूर्ण रामायण कथा | Ravi Raj | Ram Katha 2026

 मंगल भवन अमंगल हारी – रामायण चौपाई 
इस वीडियो में Ravi Raj द्वारा प्रस्तुत सम्पूर्ण रामायण कथा और चौपाइयाँ सुनें। यह भजन और कथा राम भक्तों के लिए एक अनमोल अनुभव है।

 इस वीडियो में शामिल हैं:
मंगल भवन अमंगल हारी की चौपाई
सम्पूर्ण रामायण कथा का सार
रामायण के महत्वपूर्ण प्रसंग और सीख


ध्यान और भक्ति के लिए हेडफोन का उपयोग करें
वीडियो को लाइक, शेयर करें और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें
रोज़ाना सुनने से जीवन में सुख और शांति आती है

snippet.title: Radha Radha Lyrical Video | Brindhavihari | GoldenMega⭐Ganesh | Sid Sriram | VNP | Hesham AbdulWahab
snippet.description:
Presenting the"Radha Radha" in the voice of Sid Sriram is pure Love bliss. 🎶✨ Surrendering to this melody.Song from the film BRINDAVIHARI🎶✨
Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 

“Music Slate”
Cast : Golden Mega Star Ganesh , Devika Bhat, Malvika Sharma, Lakshmi, Ram Kumar, Rangayana raghu, Achyuth kumar, Sadhu Kokila, Avinash, Kuriprathap, Manju Pavagada, Jagappa, Giri. 
Music Composed, Produced and Arranged by : Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Lyrics : Kaviratna V Nagendra Prasad
Singers : Sid Sriram & Chinmayi

--  Also Listen RAMA RAMA 
To Listen On Your Favourite Music Streaming Platform
♪ JioSaavn: https://tinyurl.com/2k8wrew5 
♪ Amazon Prime Music: https://tinyurl.com/rm76utce 
♪ Apple Music: https://tinyurl.com/5ybfepeu 
♪ Spotify Music: https://tinyurl.com/ycytays7  
♪ Insta: https://tinyurl.com/2kk8cbnb
♪ Gaana Music: https://tinyurl.com/58em3twy
♪ YouTube Music: https://tinyurl.com/2b2ea9js
-- 
Lyrics:
Pallavi:

Hadinaaru saavira Gopaala sthreeyara cheluvannu meeridaa Raadhike
Hadinaalku lokadaa manasoore maaduthaa
Nanagaagi jaaridaa taarike

Ninthale vaaluvaa gaarudi aagide
Idu yaava maayaa manthraano???
Kunthale theluvaa sambhrama moodide
Bisilalli maleya milanaano???

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaane….
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane

 ----

Charana 1:

Maddenu illade madaveri ninthiro
Maddhaane naanu aagode
Makaranda heeruthaa mai thumbikondiro
Dumbiya haage naanaade

Naaninna hesaranne gunugunugide
Kudidanthe raama rasaa… oo
Ninthalle bhoomina naa sutthide
Ee paada paadarasaa

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaane….
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane

Charana 2:

(F)
Manasoora daarige kanasoora mallige
Mruduvagi haasuvaa chaaliyo
Hareyoora therige thusugampu kedage
Manasaare Chelluvaa modiyo

(M)
Jeevave ontharaa
Premadaa nantharaa
Jagavella janthara mantharavo

Summane iddaru
Enano heluvaa
Prathimegala haage nannolavo…

Raadha Raadha ninna mouna sambhaashane
Jeevada aakarshane nannaane….
Jeevadali dhaaraa dhaaraa ninna mouna samvedane
Bhaava santharpane nannaane
Aaa… aa..
--- 
 
 “Musicians”
Composed, Produced and Arranged by Hesham Abdul Wahab.
Lyrics: Kaviratna V Nagendra Prasad.
Singer: Sid Sriram & Chinmayi
Guitars & Bass: Sumesh Parameshwar.
Woodwinds,Strings Arranged and Produced by Josy Alappuzha.
Strings Conducted by: Josy Alappuzha.
Live Rythms and Percussions: Kalyan.
Halgi, Hand Duff, K-Dhol, Metal Shakers,
Pakhwaj, Puneri Dhol, Stk Duff, Tasha by Dipesh Varma.
Percussions performed by Dipesh Varma, Khwab Haria, Ratnadeep Jamsandekar, Vijay Jadhav
Additional programming: Josy Alappuzha, Vichuuuh and Praboa.
Mix and Mastered by Harishankar V at Aural Alchemy Kochi.
Mix Assisted by Santom Jose, Azhar Thaju.
Strings: Francis Xavier,Herald,Carol george,Dany, FrancisTS,Albin Jose, Mariadas, Subin Kumar.
Chorus:Sony Mohan,Aavani Malhar, Anila Rajiv, Ajmal Fathima, Neethusha AC,
Dr.Maalavika,Angel Mary Joseph,Anna Merin Easo, Zia and Dhana.Milan Joy, Akash V H, Amal C Ajith, Amithav Suresh, Akhil Dev, Famis Muhammad, Siyad k, Tansen Berny, Sangeeth Panchamam, Arjun B Nair, Deric Dereesh.
Recording Engineers:Shiju ediyatheril at Audio Gene Kochi, Aswin Kumar at K7 studio Kochi, Hesham Abdul Wahab, Vichuuuh & Praboa at HW studio Kochi, Vijay Dhayal and Sagar Sathe at YRF studio, Mumbai.
Assistant Recording Eng: Pete Dane Vaz at AudioGene Kochi, Gokul Krishna at K7 studio Kochi. Rahul Sahajrao at YRF Mumbai.
Artist Coordination: K.D Vincent, Kishore.
Special Thanks to Ayshath Safa.

snippet.title: Franklin Find and Kill Zombies - Indian Bike Driving 3D
snippet.description:
Franklin Find and Kill Zombies - Indian Bike Driving 3D


Franklin is back with a new zombie mission in Indian Bike Driving 3D. In the story of Indian Bike Driving 3D, an alien ship lands over Franklin's house and dangerous zombies spread in the city and one of them attacks Franklin's Grandfather and turns him into a zombie too. Now Franklin Shinchan and Hulk will kill all the zombies hiding inside Indian Bike Driving 3D city and save Franklin's Grandfather's life.

Disclaimer:
"This video is for entertainment and educational purposes only. The gameplay shown is from fictional video games: Indian Bike Driving 3D and GTA V.
Fictional Content: All characters, events, and incidents shown in this video are purely fictional and have no relation to real-life people or events.
Safety Warning: Do not attempt to recreate any stunts, driving, or actions shown in this video in real life. These acts are performed by professionals in a virtual environment and can be dangerous if performed in reality.
Copyright: This video is made under the 'Fair Use' guidelines for the purpose of commentary and entertainment. All rights belong to their respective owners (Rockstar Games and Rohit Gaming Studio).

snippet.title: और इस दिल में | Imaandaar | Asha Bhosle | Suresh Wadkar Songs | Farah | Pran | Sanjay Dutt
snippet.description:
Embark on a nostalgic journey with the timeless voices of Asha Bhosle and Suresh Wadkar, as we revisit the enchanting melody of 'Aur Is Dil Mein' from the movie 'Imaandaar'. Relive the golden era of 1980s Bollywood, where love and emotions were woven into unforgettable songs. Asha Bhosle and Suresh Wadkar's rendition of this song is a testament to their artistry and their ability to evoke deep feelings within us. Their voices blend seamlessly, creating a magical experience that touches the soul. This song perfectly captures the essence of love and longing, transporting you to a time of pure romance and heartfelt emotions.



Credits :

Song: Aur Is Dil Mein
Album: Imaandaar
Artist: Asha Bhosle | Suresh Wadkar
Music Director: Kalyanji-Anandji
Lyricist: Prakash Mehra 



Lyrics :

aur is dil me.n kyaa rakhaa hai		
teraa hii pyaar chhupaa rakhaa hai	
chiir ke dekhe, dil meraa to		
teraa hii dard chhupaa rakhaa hai	

pyaar ke afsaane, sune the logo.n se
pyaar kyaa hotaa hai, yah tuune samajhaayaa
milaa dil tujhase to, Kaab dekhe aise
junuu.n jaane kaisaa, javaa.n dil pe chhaayaa
dil me.n aisaa dard uThaa dil ho gayaa diivaanaa
dil ho gayaa diivaanaa ...
diivaano.n ne, is duniyaa me.n		
dard kaa naam davaa rakhaa hai		
aur is dil me.n, kyaa rakhaa hai
teraa hii pyaar chhupaa rakhaa hai

nigaaho.n me.n merii, yah suurat hai terii
suurat yah terii, inaayat hai merii
dha.Dakate siine me.n, mohabbat hai terii
mohabbat hai terii, ibaadat hai merii
tere sivaa kuchh yaad nahii.n hai tuu hii tuu dil me.n
haa.N tuu hii tuu dil me.n
dil ne pyaar kii puujaa kii hai		
pyaar kaa naam Kudaa rakhaa hai		
aur is dil me.n, kyaa rakhaa hai
teraa hii pyaar chhupaa rakhaa hai

Let the enchanting melodies of Asha Bhosle and Suresh Wadkar fill your heart with warmth and nostalgia. Immerse yourself in the magic of 'Aur Is Dil Mein' and rediscover the beauty of classic Bollywood music.

If this timeless classic touched your heart, please like, comment with your favorite 80s song, and subscribe for more golden melodies! Let the magic of music live on…

snippet.title: Jibana O Marana | ଜୀବନ ମାୟାର ଖେଳ ମରଣ ହିଁ ସତ୍ୟ | Soulful Odia Bhajan Jukebox | Odia Bhakti Dhara
snippet.description:
ଏହି ସଂସାର ଏକ ରଙ୍ଗମଞ୍ଚ ଏବଂ ଆମେ ସମସ୍ତେ ସେହି ମାୟାଧରଙ୍କ ହାତର କଣ୍ଢେଇ। ଜୀବନ ଆସେ ପୁଣି ଚାଲିଯାଏ, କିନ୍ତୁ ରହିଯାଏ କେବଳ ପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ନାମ 

Singers : Namita Agrawal, Satyajeet Pradhan, Md.Aziz, Sonu Nigam, Anasuya Nath, Subash Dash, Sourav Nayak, Tapu Mishra

ସବୁ ବନ୍ଧନମୋ ଖୋଲିଦେଇ ପ୍ରଭୁ - 00:00
ମୁଁ ଦି ଦିନର କୁଣିଆ - 05:26
ତୋ ବାହୁଡ଼ାରେ ନେ ବାହୁଡେଇ - 10:14
ଧିରି ଧିରି କରି ଖେଳୁଥା ଦୋଳି - 14:49
ଲିଭି ଯାଉ ମୋର - 20:05
ଜୀବନ ଦି ମୁଠା ମାଟି - 25:33
ବେଦୀ ମୁଣ୍ଡେ ଖେଳ - 29:47
ଏମିତି ଏକ ସମୟ ଆସେ - 35:17
ଅଳିକ ଜୀବନ - 46:09
ଆସିବା ଦିନେ ଯିବାତ ଦିନେ - 51:48
ଦୁଃଖ ମୋ କଜଳ ଗାର - 56:29

snippet.title: KULBIR JHINJER: KALLA KALLA TAARA | Deep Jandu | Geet Goraya | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
White Hill Music Presents Kalla Kalla Taara — Out Now 🌌✨ | New Punjabi Song 2026

When words fall short, music speaks… Kalla Kalla Taara is a soothing Punjabi melody that brings calm vibes, love, and beautiful feelings together. ✨ Kulbir Jhinjer delivers a smooth and soulful performance, with lyrics by Lally Mundi and music by Deep Jandu creating a relaxing musical experience.

If you enjoy latest Punjabi songs 2026 and soft Punjabi music, this track is perfect for your playlist. 🎶 The cinematic video by Shavvy featuring Gurjot Kaur adds a visually pleasing touch to this melodious track.

🌙 Sit back, relax & let the melody flow…
💬 Tell us where you’re listening from & how this song makes you feel
🔔 Subscribe for more soothing Punjabi music

#KallaKallaTaara #KulbirJhinjer #DeepJandu #PunjabiSong #NewPunjabiSong2026 #SoothingMelody #PunjabiMusic

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Zara Dekh Mera Deewanapan | Footpath | Bipasha Basu | Aftab Shivdasani | Udit Narayan | Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Zara Dekh Mera Deewanapan | Footpath | Bipasha Basu | Aftab Shivdasani | Udit Narayan | Alka Yagnik

Song Credits:
Singer(s): Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Nadeem - Shravan
Lyricist: Praveen Bhardwaj 

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tips Films, Mukesh Bhatt
Director: Vikram Bhatt
Cast: Emraan Hashmi, Aftab Shivdasani, Rahul Dev, Bipasha Basu

Lyrics:
Dil Na Lage Na Lage Na Lage Ho
Zaraa Dekh Meraa Deewaanaapan
O Zaraa Dekh Meraa Deewaanaapan
Ke Tere Binaa Kahin Dil Na Lage
Aa Sun To Sahi Dil Ki Dhadkan 
Aa Sun To Sahi Dil Ki Dhadkan
Ke Tere Binaa Kahin Dil Na Lage
O Saathiyaa Saathiyaa Re Saathiyaa Re Saathiyaa

Meri Aankhon Ne Bhi Dekhaa Thaa Vafaa Ka Sapnaa
Maine Sochaa Thaa Koi Hogaa Meraa Bhi Apnaa
Zakhm Mujhko Jo Lagaa Hai Main Dikhaaoon Kaise
Apni Majboori Bhalaa Tujhko Bataaoon Kaise
Apnaa Afsaanaa Sanam Tujhko Sunaaoon Kaise
Badti Jaaye Meri Uljhan
O Badti Jaaye Meri Uljhan
Ke Tere Binaa Kahin Dil Na Lage

Apni Nazron Ko Bahaaron Kaa Nazaaraa Doongi
Dil Ki Kashti Ko Mohabbat Ka Kinaaraa Doongi
Maine Sochaa Thaa Ke Palkon Pe Chhupaaoongi Tujhe
Maine Sochaa Thaa Ke Saanson Mein Basaaoongi Tujhe
Apni Chaahat Kaa Maseehaa Main Banaaoongi Tujhe
Zaraa Dekh Meraa Ye Paagalpan
O Zaraa Dekh Meraa Ye Paagalpan
Ke Tere Binaa Kahin Dil Na Lage

Aa Sun To Sahi Dil Ki Dhadkan
Aa Sun To Sahi Dil Ki Dhadkan
Ke Tere Binaa Kahin Dil Na Lage

#ZaraDekhMeraDeewanapan #Footpath #BipashaBasu #AftabShivdasani #UditNarayan #AlkaYagnik

snippet.title: रुला देगा ये भजन | मेरी विनती यही है नन्दलाल सदा तू मेरे साथ रहे | Krishna Bhajan 2026
snippet.description:
❤ भक्ति पूर्ण गानों के लिए क्लिक करें : http://goo.gl/atXd0e


रुला देगा ये भजन 😢🙏
मेरी विनती यही है नन्दलाल, सदा तू मेरे साथ रहे — यह बेहद भावुक, दिल को छू लेने वाला और आत्मा को शांति देने वाला कृष्ण भजन है।
इस मधुर भजन में भक्त अपने नन्दलाल श्री कृष्ण से यही प्रार्थना करता है कि जीवन के हर सुख-दुख, हर मोड़, हर कठिन समय में प्रभु सदा उसके साथ रहें।

अगर आप भी श्री कृष्ण के सच्चे भक्त हैं, तो इस भजन को अंत तक जरूर सुनें और अपने मन को भक्ति में डुबो दें।
यह भजन आपके दिल को छू जाएगा और आंखें नम कर देगा। 💙🎶

🙏 जय श्री कृष्ण
🙏 राधे राधे
🙏 नन्दलाल सदा मेरे साथ रहना

🔔 ऐसे ही सुंदर और भावुक कृष्ण भजन सुनने के लिए चैनल को Subscribe करें।
👍 भजन पसंद आए तो Like करें
💬 Comment में लिखें — राधे राधे

hi.description:
❤ भक्ति पूर्ण गानों के लिए क्लिक करें : http://goo.gl/atXd0e


रुला देगा ये भजन 😢🙏
मेरी विनती यही है नन्दलाल, सदा तू मेरे साथ रहे — यह बेहद भावुक, दिल को छू लेने वाला और आत्मा को शांति देने वाला कृष्ण भजन है।
इस मधुर भजन में भक्त अपने नन्दलाल श्री कृष्ण से यही प्रार्थना करता है कि जीवन के हर सुख-दुख, हर मोड़, हर कठिन समय में प्रभु सदा उसके साथ रहें।

अगर आप भी श्री कृष्ण के सच्चे भक्त हैं, तो इस भजन को अंत तक जरूर सुनें और अपने मन को भक्ति में डुबो दें।
यह भजन आपके दिल को छू जाएगा और आंखें नम कर देगा। 💙🎶

🙏 जय श्री कृष्ण
🙏 राधे राधे
🙏 नन्दलाल सदा मेरे साथ रहना

🔔 ऐसे ही सुंदर और भावुक कृष्ण भजन सुनने के लिए चैनल को Subscribe करें।
👍 भजन पसंद आए तो Like करें
💬 Comment में लिखें — राधे राधे

en-US.title: This bhajan will make you cry. My only request is that Nandlal, you always stay with me. Krishna ...
en-US.description:
❤ Click for devotional songs: http://goo.gl/atXd0e

This hymn will make you cry 😢🙏
My request is this: Nandlal, always stay with me—this is a very emotional, heart-touching, and soul-soothing Krishna hymn.

In this melodious hymn, the devotee prays to his Nandlal, Shri Krishna, that the Lord always be with him through every joy and sorrow, every turn, and every difficult time in life.

If you are a true devotee of Shri Krishna, then listen to this hymn until the end and immerse your mind in devotion.

This hymn will touch your heart and bring tears to your eyes. 💙🎶

🙏 Jai Shri Krishna
🙏 Radhe Radhe
🙏 Nandlal always stay with me

🔔 Subscribe to the channel to listen to such beautiful and emotional Krishna hymns.

👍 If you like the bhajan then like it.
💬 Write in comment - Radhe Radhe

snippet.title: O Meri Laila | Laila Majnu | Patta Anaaron Ka Patta Chinaron Ka Jaise Hawaon Mein | Tu Meri Laila
snippet.description:
Movie - Laila Majnu
Cast - Avinash Tiwary & Tripti Dimri

Song -  O Meri Laila
Singers - Jyotica Tangri
Music - Joi Barua
Lyrics - Irshad Kamil

Lyrics:

Patta Anaaron Ka Patta Chinaron Ka Jaise Hawaon Mein
Aise Bhatakta Hoon Din Raat Dikhta Hoon Main Teri Raahon Mein
Mere Gunaho Mein Mere Sawabo Mein Shamil Tu
Bhooli Atthanni Si Bachpan Ke Kurte Mein Se Mil Tu

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Laila
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

Maangi Thi Duwaen Jo Unka Hi Asar Hai Hum Sath Hain
Na Yahan Dikhawa Hai Na Yahan Dunyavi Jazbaat Hain

Yahan Pe Bhi Tu Hooron Se Zyada Haseen 
Yaani Dono Jahanon Mein Tumsa Nahi
Jeet Li Hain Aakhir Mein Hum Dono Ne Yeh Baaziyan 

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Lailan
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

O Meri Laila Laila Khwaab Tu Hai Pehla 
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila (X2)

Zaiqa Jawani Mein, Khwaabon Mein Yaar Ki Mehmaani Mein
Marziyaan Tumhari Hon, Khush Rahoon Main Teri Manmaani Mein

Band Aakhein Karoon Din Ko Raatein Karoon
Teri Zulfon Ko Sehla Ke Baatein Karoon
Ishq Mein Un Baaton Se Hon Meethi Si Naraaziyan

snippet.title: Shivakesava Bhakthipatalu | Powerful Shiva Vishnu Devotional Songs 2026
snippet.description:
Experience divine peace, protection, and spiritual power with Shivakesava Bhakthipatalu, a powerful devotional collection dedicated to Lord Shiva and Lord Vishnu, the symbols of transformation, preservation, and divine balance.

This devotional playlist combines the blessings of Shiva and Keshava (Vishnu) to bring harmony, prosperity, and spiritual strength. Perfect for daily prayers, meditation, and pooja.

✨ Benefits of Listening:

Removes negativity and obstacles
Brings peace, prosperity, and protection
Enhances devotion and spiritual balance
Strengthens positivity and inner peace
Invites divine blessings from Shiva & Vishnu

Play these songs during pooja, meditation, or morning prayers to receive divine grace.

🙏 Subscribe for more Telugu devotional songs, bhakti patalu, and spiritual content.

Join this channel:

"બોલે જીણા જીણા મોર" જે જશવંત ગાંગાણી ની કલમે લખાયેલ અને લોક લાડીલા કૌશિક ભરવાડ, અને તેજલ ઠાકોર નાં સુંદર સ્વરની જુગલબંધી માં ગવાયેલ આ સોંગ તમને તમારા સાચા પ્રેમ ના સંબંધોને યાદ કરાવશે. સાચો પ્રેમ હંમેશા દિલમાં રહે છે...
